mapper.insert: INSERT INTO files ( user_seq, board_seq, file_category, oriname, sysname, file_size, file_type ) VALUES ( #{userSeq}, #{boardSeq}, #{fileCategory}, #{oriname}, #{sysname}, #{fileSize}, #{fileType} )
mapper.select: SELECT user_seq AS userSeq, board_seq AS boardSeq, file_category AS fileCategory, oriname, sysname, file_size AS fileSize, file_type AS fileType FROM files WHERE user_seq = #{userSeq} AND file_category = #{category} ORDER BY files_seq ASC
